ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "description" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather description */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the weather data in Unix time */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_deg" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "last_updated" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_description FOREIGN KEY ("description") REFERENCES weather_descriptions ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "geographical_area" INTEGER /* Geographical area of the city in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather description */,
  "description_text" TEXT /* Text describing the weather condition */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the weather icon */,
  "description_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the weather description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, premium user, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for notifications */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of weather alert (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the subscription is set */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* User's preference for notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "start_date" INTEGER /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" INTEGER /* End date of the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription that triggered the alert */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query performed (e.g., trend analysis, pattern search) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the query was performed */,
  "query_details" TEXT /* Details of the query performed */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the query was performed */,
  "query_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the query in seconds */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_queries_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_synced" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last data synchronization */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data synchronization (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
